# DailyCoder

> DailyCoder (https://dailycoder.in) is a free platform for software developers. It offers a daily coding problem you can solve in the browser, 16 privacy-first developer tools that run entirely client-side, engineering deep-dive articles, and hands-on interactive courses. No signup is required to use the tools or read content.

Everything runs in the browser. The developer tools never send your data to a server, and most content is freely accessible. The site is built with Astro and hosted as a static site.

## Developer Tools
Free, client-side tools at https://dailycoder.in/tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://dailycoder.in/tools/json-formatter): Format, validate, and minify JSON with multi-tab support.
- [JSON Diff](https://dailycoder.in/tools/json-diff): Compare two JSON objects side-by-side.
- [CSV to JSON](https://dailycoder.in/tools/csv-json): Convert between CSV and JSON formats.
- [Code Formatter & Preview](https://dailycoder.in/tools/code-formatter): Format or minify code with a side-by-side preview.
- [JavaScript Runner](https://dailycoder.in/tools/js-runner): Write and execute JavaScript in a browser sandbox.
- [Diff Checker](https://dailycoder.in/tools/diff-checker): Compare texts with git-style highlighting.
- [Regex Tester](https://dailycoder.in/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with live matching.
- [Markdown Preview](https://dailycoder.in/tools/markdown-preview): Write markdown with live preview and PDF export.
- [Color Picker](https://dailycoder.in/tools/color-picker): Pick colors and gradients, save palettes, export CSS/SASS.
- [Color Converter](https://dailycoder.in/tools/color-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL.
- [QR Generator](https://dailycoder.in/tools/qr-generator): Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi, email, and phone.
- [Canvas Draw](https://dailycoder.in/tools/canvas-draw): Draw flowcharts, diagrams, and wireframes.
- [JWT Decoder](https://dailycoder.in/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://dailycoder.in/tools/timestamp): Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates.
- [Timezone Converter](https://dailycoder.in/tools/timezone): Convert time between timezones with world clocks.
- [Clipboard Manager](https://dailycoder.in/tools/clipboard): Save, search, and organize clipboard snippets.

## Coding Problems
Practice problems with an in-browser editor, test cases, and progress tracking.

- [All Problems](https://dailycoder.in/problems): Curated coding problems across many topics and difficulties.
- [Problem of the Day](https://dailycoder.in/daily/problem): A new daily coding challenge with streak tracking.

## Blog
Engineering deep-dives, architecture patterns, and practical career tips.

- [Blog](https://dailycoder.in/blog): All articles.
- [Blog RSS Feed](https://dailycoder.in/rss.xml)
- [Daily Problems RSS Feed](https://dailycoder.in/daily/problem/rss.xml)

## Courses
Hands-on interactive courses with lesson tracking.

- [Courses](https://dailycoder.in/courses): All interactive courses.

## Documentation
- [Tech Guides](https://dailycoder.in/docs): Reference documentation and guides.

## About
- [About](https://dailycoder.in/about): What DailyCoder is and who builds it.
- [Contact](https://dailycoder.in/contact): Get in touch.
